name: Newborn is NOT yours
description:
Your wife Becky gave birth to baby in hospital, w/ the baby looking nothing like you. Baby looks like her friend Shawn, w/ your family looking anxious you would flip out.

Your family and friends reassure you that, yes, the baby's skin color and face look exactly like Shawn's and nothing like yours, but all babies look scrunched up when they are born! You will see, he will look just like you when he grows up!

They hope their lies will prevent you from causing any drama at the hospital: they just want you to stay with Becky and provide a happy life for the newborn.

Shawn is looking for an excuse to leave the hospital room. He doesn't wanna raise the kid financially himself, although he will meet up w/ Becky later on in secret, so he can give her emotional and sexual support.

Shawn isn't gonna man up. So it is up to you to step up to the plate. Are you gonna man up?
creator: VRCat
